summary: Testing completed for 3 fixes in iteration 17: 1) Analytics Fix verified - customer analytics now uses only approved/sent/edited bills for total_spent calculations, 2) Salespeople Branch features working - branch select in add form and filter dropdown present, 3) Customer Edit button working - navigates to /customer/:phone edit page
passed_tests: Analytics Fix: GET /api/analytics/customers returns correct total_spent based on approved bills only
Analytics Fix: GET /api/analytics/customers/frequency calculates cohort totals from approved bills only
Analytics Fix: GET /api/customers/{id}/bills returns total_spent matching sum of approved/sent/edited bills
Analytics Fix: Draft bills (₹125,505.50 in test) correctly EXCLUDED from total_spent (₹210,411.09)
Analytics Fix: Reports Customers tab shows reasonable frequency cohort values
Salespeople Branch: GET /api/salespeople returns branch_name if assigned
Salespeople Branch: POST /api/salespeople accepts branch_id parameter
Salespeople Branch: Branch select dropdown EXISTS in add form (data-testid='salesperson-branch-select')
Salespeople Branch: Branch filter dropdown EXISTS at top of list (data-testid='filter-branch-select')
Salespeople Branch: Creating salesperson with branch_id correctly associates and returns branch_name
Customer Edit: 'Edit Details' button EXISTS on Customer History page (data-testid='edit-customer-details-btn')
Customer Edit: Button contains Edit icon and 'Edit Details' text
Customer Edit: Clicking button navigates to /customer/:phone correctly
Customer Edit: Customer profile edit page shows all fields (Name, Phone, Email, Location, Reference, DOB, Anniversary, Address, Notes)
critical_code_review_comments: server.py: GET /api/analytics/customers now queries bills with status in ['sent','approved','edited'] instead of using cached customer.total_spent
server.py: GET /api/analytics/customers/frequency uses bill-based spending per customer phone number for cohort calculations
SalespeopleManagement.js: Complete rewrite with branch_id support - add form has branch select, list has filter dropdown
CustomerHistoryPage.js: Edit Details button at line 73 navigates to /customer/:phone route

admin.method: Click 'Admin Login' link on login page

seed_data_creation: Created test salesperson with branch_id during testing (cleaned up)
